title: Reader-Centric Business Writing
subtitle: A practical workplace effectiveness workshop focused on reader-centric business writing.
whyThisMatters: Reader-Centric Business Writing helps participants turn course concepts into practical workplace habits. The programme gives teams a shared foundation, clearer language, and guided practice so they can connect the subject to personal effectiveness, communication, and everyday performance and apply the learning with more confidence after the workshop.
builtFor: Employees who need stronger communication or personal effectiveness habits
walkAwayWith: Communicate and organize work with more clarity and confidence.
Apply practical tools to improve decisions, writing, planning, or collaboration.
Recognize habits that affect personal and team performance.
Build action steps for better day-to-day effectiveness.

modules.title: Discovering your own communication styles that enhance your relationships
Exploring reasons and causes for ineffective communication
Identifying your domain style through CSS (Communication Style Survey)
Being able to work on conflict resolution techniques

methodologyCaption: The workshop combines short inputs, practical exercises, and reflection so participants can translate the topic into everyday work habits.
